overall.description: A smooth drone flight over calm water approaching and circumnavigating a large modern airport terminal with a distinctive curved solar-panel roof. The footage is from Microsoft Flight Simulator, featuring clear midday lighting and reflective water surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront approach to airport terminal

agents.ego_description: flying drone low over calm water toward the modern terminal building in the distance

entered.detail: large building with curved solar-panel roof and multiple arch supports
small rectangular red structure floating on the water near the terminal
scattered green trees on the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: The drone flies over calm reflective water toward a massive modern airport terminal with a distinctive curved roof. A small red structure sits on the water near the terminal's concrete embankment, while distant trees line the horizon under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: close passage along terminal waterfront facade

events.description: camera passes the small red boathouse and moves closer to the terminal facade

agents.ego_description: flying closely alongside the curved terminal facade, observing architectural details of the glass and steel structure

entered.detail: triangular steel support structures beneath the curved roof
concrete shoreline platform at the base of the terminal building

segments.scene_description: The drone moves into close proximity with the terminal's massive curved facade, passing under the overhanging roof structure. The architectural details of the glass panels and steel arch supports become visible as the drone flies parallel to the concrete embankment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront beyond terminal with shoreline vegetation

events.description: passing the end of the terminal building, revealing open shoreline and trees beyond

agents.ego_description: continuing past the terminal into open water area, approaching shallow shoreline with vegetation

entered.detail: shallow water and sandy beach area beyond the terminal
cluster of green trees along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The drone passes the end of the terminal, revealing an open landscape with sandy shoreline and scattered trees. The massive terminal building recedes to the left as the camera continues over increasingly shallow water toward the vegetated shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone flight over reflective water that transitions from a wide approach of a modern airport terminal to an open, natural shoreline. It begins by gliding across the calm surface toward a massive terminal with a distinctive curved roof, passing a small red structure perched near the concrete embankment. As the camera moves into close proximity, it slides under the overhanging roof, revealing the intricate glass panels and steel arch supports of the facade while flying parallel to the waterfront. The scene then opens up as the drone passes the end of the building, causing the terminal to recede to the left. Finally, the camera continues over increasingly shallow water toward a vegetated shore characterized by sandy terrain and scattered trees under a clear blue sky.
